news.t: First Eagle Active ETF Platform Surpasses $3 Billion in Assets Less than 18 Months after Launch

holdings.infoBox: FEMD is an equity ETF with a total of 65 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 3.22%, TTM Technologies at 2.41%, nVent Electric at 2.31%, Targa Resources at 2.05%, and United Rentals at 1.98%.

overview.description: The First Eagle Mid Cap Equity ETF (FEMD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund invests primarily in US mid-cap equity securities using active stock selection driven by fundamental analysis. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation FEMD was launched on Jan 27, 2026 and is issued by First Eagle.

data.title: First Eagle Active ETF Platform Surpasses $3 Billion in Assets Less than 18 Months after Launch
data.text: NEW YORK NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Eagle Investments' actively managed ETF platform has exceeded $3 billion in assets under management (AUM) as of May 12th, 2026, less than 18 months after its ...
